subcodes.first_line: The most joyful tidings is this, that the holy, the luminous body of the Bab ... after having for sixty years been transferred from place to place
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی بشارت کبری اینکه هیکل مطهر منور مقدس حضرت اعلی روحی له الفداء
subcodes.subjects: @sacred remains; burial of the Bab, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @growth of the Cause, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @Shrines and Holy places
